zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Forez於1337年5月10日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易洛納時，她的父親Guigues VII de Forez38歲，母親Jeanne de BOURBON26歲。她於1357年6月22日與Berauld II d'Auvergne在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1369年2月17日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易沙吉希格斯享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Forez于1337年5月10日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯洛易洛納时，她的父亲Guigues VII de Forez38岁，母亲Jeanne de BOURBON26岁。她于1357年6月22日与Berauld II d'Auvergne在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1369年2月17日在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易沙吉希格斯享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Forez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Antoine, Camille, Emile, Anatole, Armand, Chantal, Clemile, Clovis, Gillis.
French (Forêt): variant of Forest ‘forest’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Forest
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pascal, Amie, Armand, Bertice, Etienne, Fernand, Germaine, Jacques, Normand, Sylvain.

French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one, from Old French forest ‘forest’; or a habitational name from (La) Forest, the name of several places in various parts of France. Unlike modern French forêt, forest was not simply a word for extensive woodland, but referred specifically to large wooded areas reserved by law for the king and his nobles to hunt in (see also English Forrest ). Compare Deforest and Laforest .
English and Scottish: variant of   Forrest  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Forez was born on 10 May 1337, in Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues VII de Forez, was 38 and her mother, Jeanne de BOURBON, was 26. She married Berauld II d'Auvergne on 22 June 1357, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 17 February 1369, in Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Forez est née le 10 mai 1337, à Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues VII de Forez, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de BOURBON, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Berauld II d'Auvergne le 22 juin 1357, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 février 1369, à Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Forez am 10. Mai 1337 in Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues VII de Forez 38 und ihre Mutter Jeanne de BOURBON 26. Sie hat am 22. Juni 1357 in Frankreich Berauld II d'Auvergne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. Februar 1369 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Forez è nata il il 10 maggio 1337 nel Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues VII de Forez, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Jeanne de BOURBON, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Berauld II d'Auvergne il 22 giugno 1357, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 17 febbraio 1369, nel Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Forezが1337年5月10日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスロイアーロアンで生まれた時，父Guigues VII de Forezは38歳，母Jeanne de BOURBONは26歳であった。1357年6月22日にフランスでBerauld II d'Auvergneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1369年2月17日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーサイント-シルグスで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Forez(이)가 1337년 5월 10일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 로이르 로니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues VII de Forez(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne de BOURBON(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1357년 6월 22일 프랑스에서 Berauld II d'Auvergne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1369년 2월 17일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 세인트-시르구스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 mai 1337–17 février 1369: 10 de maio de 1337–17 de fevereiro de 1369
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Forez nasceu em 10 de maio de 1337, em Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues VII de Forez, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de BOURBON, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Berauld II d'Auvergne em 22 de junho de 1357, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1369, em Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Forez родилась 10 мая 1337 г. в местности роанн, лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues VII de Forez было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de BOURBON, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Berauld II d'Auvergne 22 июня 1357 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 февраля 1369 г. в местности сеинт-сиргуесь, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 31 год.

es.10 mai 1337–17 février 1369: 10 de mayo de 1337–17 de febrero de 1369
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Forez nació el 10 de mayo de 1337, en Roanne, Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues VII de Forez, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Jeanne de BOURBON, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Berauld II d'Auvergne el 22 de junio de 1357, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1369, en Saint-Cirgues, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 31 años.
